sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n104931" key="trihmi/phxus" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρῐημῐ´-πηχυς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">υ,</itype> <sense id="n104931.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a cubit and a half long,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1240.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Callix.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
